description: FM-09 (RPN=60): Single worker dispatch where ALL SDK HTTP retry attempts get 500. With HttpRetryOptions(attempts=2), the worker makes 2 HTTP attempts (initial + 1 retry), both faulted. After SDK retries exhaust, on_model_error_callback fires producing LLMResult(error=True, error_category='SERVER'). REPL code checks result.error and reports the failure. Reasoning returns FINAL acknowledging the error.

responses.note: Reasoning agent emits execute_code with llm_query. Code checks result.error to detect server failure.
Reasoning sees tool result with error output from REPL, returns FINAL reporting the server error.

parts.text:
Worker encountered server error after retry exhaustion.

FINAL(Worker error: server retry exhausted)

error.message: Internal server error (worker HTTP attempt 2 - retry exhausted)
